summary: Mode-aware UI/UX skill: proto (design), validation (review), guide (implementation guidance), all.

scripts.purpose: Count UI files, style files, stories, and tests; return accessibility and state-coverage checklist prompts.
Scan HTML/JSX/TSX/Vue/Svelte for missing alt text, icon button names, clickable divs, and unlabeled inputs.
Map stories and tests against required UI states: loading, empty, error, success, disabled, focused, permission.
Scan styles and components for viewport font sizing, negative letter spacing, 100vw overflow, and fragile absolute layout.

signals: mode is explicit (proto / validation / guide / all)
all 7 interaction states are covered for the feature in scope
accessibility and responsive checks are included in validation mode
open product questions are listed, not guessed
